creator: jahnke@sonatabio.com
text:
The new version of acroread, 7.0.8, breaks linuxpluginwrapper 20051113_4 for Epiphany 2.14.3 and Firefox 1.5.06.

Fix: 

Use linux-opera?
How-To-Repeat: firefox about:plugins
LoadPlugin: failed to initialize shared library /usr/X11R6/Adobe/Acrobat7.0/ENU/Browser/intellinux/nppdf.so [/usr/X11R6/Adobe/Acrobat7.0/ENU/Browser/intellinux/nppdf.so: Undefined symbol "__ctype_b_loc"]
LoadPlugin: failed to initialize shared library /usr/X11R6/Adobe/Acrobat7.0/ENU/Browser/intellinux/nppdf.so [/usr/X11R6/Adobe/Acrobat7.0/ENU/Browser/intellinux/nppdf.so: Undefined symbol "__ctype_b_loc"]

The plugins do not load; the others in linuxpluginwrapper do.
